name: Shells with Shrimp and Green Beans in Garlic Oil
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Thinly sliced dried tomatoes (in oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a medium skillet; stir in garlic and red pepper.
2. Sauté over low heat for 1 minute.
3. Raise the heat to high; immediately add the shrimp all at once.
4. Sauté, stirring constantly, until the shrimp turn pink (about 3 minutes). Do not overcook.
5. Stir in the sundried tomatoes (in oil) and parsley.
6. Remove from heat. Cook shells until tender.
7. Toss shrimp mixture, shells, and beans together. Serve at once.
